how_far: Reached the boss on 2/20 seeds (seeds 1 & 3 at 40% progress, wave 3) but failed to defeat it. Average progress across 20 seeds is 20% (median 13.3%). Best non-boss runs reach wave 2, level 4 (seed 19: 33%). No game cleared.
failure_modes: Boss DPS wall: Auto-fire alone can't overcome boss HP pool - reached boss with level 2 (seed 1) and level 4 (seed 3) but zero HP destroyed
Seed difficulty variance: ~90% of tested seeds die in wave 1-2; only favorable seeds (1,3) and near-misses (19) reach wave 3
Wave 2 spike: Sharp difficulty jump kills most runs before they reach level 4+
No clear progression path to victory: Existing strategy maxes at 40% progress (boss reached) with no path to boss defeat
lessons: Bullet velocity prediction + threat-level-adaptive dodge is highly effective
Rarity-based upgrade selection (survival > utility > damage) works well for getting to boss but not defeating it
Item collection strategy: chase when safe (≤2 nearby bullets), approach carefully when threatened (>2), dodge when critical (≥4)
Boss fights need special handling: dodge hard, grab items greedily, position below for constant fire
Survival upgrades are prerequisite - games without shields/healing die much earlier
Some seeds are intrinsically harder due to arena layout, enemy spawn patterns, or item distribution - no single strategy generalizes perfectly
The 40% wall suggests boss HP/DPS ratio is extremely high - may require specific upgrade synergies or burst-damage mechanics to overcome
